---
title: "PCA human"
output: html_notebook
---

```{r}
txi_data <- readRDS("bgee_gtex_tximport_gene_level.rds")
sample_metadata_organ <- read.csv("sample_metadata_organ.csv", row.names = 1)

# Extract age 
if (!"age" %in% colnames(sample_metadata_organ)) {
  sample_metadata_organ$age <- scale(
  as.numeric(sub("age: ", "", sample_metadata_organ$infoStage))
)
}
```

```{r}
library(DESeq2)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(patchwork)

run_pca_batch_check <- function(organ_name, meta, txi_data) {
  
  meta_org <- meta %>% filter(SMTS_refined == organ_name)
  samples  <- rownames(meta_org)
  samples  <- samples[samples %in% colnames(txi_data$counts)]
  meta_org <- meta_org[samples, ]
  
  dds <- DESeqDataSetFromTximport(
    txi = list(
      counts              = txi_data$counts[, samples],
      abundance           = txi_data$abundance[, samples],
      length              = txi_data$length[, samples],
      countsFromAbundance = txi_data$countsFromAbundance
    ),
    colData = meta_org,
    design  = ~ 1
  )
  
  keep <- rowSums(counts(dds)) >= 10
  dds  <- dds[keep, ]
  
  # VST normalization (blind = TRUE)
  vsd <- vst(dds, blind = TRUE)
  
  # PCA data
  pca_data    <- plotPCA(vsd, intgroup = "side", returnData = TRUE)
  percent_var <- round(100 * attr(pca_data, "percentVar"))
  
  # Add metadata to PCA data
  pca_data <- pca_data %>%
    left_join(meta_org %>% 
                dplyr::select(SMCENTER, SMGEBTCH, SMNABTCH, platform, sex, age) %>%
                tibble::rownames_to_column("sample_id"),
              by = c("name" = "sample_id"))
  
  base_plot <- function(color_var, title_suffix) {
    ggplot(pca_data, aes(PC1, PC2, color = .data[[color_var]])) +
      geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 0.8) +
      xlab(paste0("PC1: ", percent_var[1], "% variance")) +
      ylab(paste0("PC2: ", percent_var[2], "% variance")) +
      ggtitle(paste0(organ_name, " — ", title_suffix)) +
      theme_bw() +
      theme(legend.position = "bottom",
            legend.text = element_text(size = 7))
  }
  
  p_side    <- base_plot("side",     "Side (L/R)")
  p_sex     <- base_plot("sex",      "Sex")
  p_center  <- base_plot("SMCENTER", "Collection Center")
  p_gebtch  <- base_plot("SMGEBTCH", "Genotype Batch")
  
  combined <- (p_side | p_sex) / (p_center | p_gebtch) +
    plot_annotation(title = organ_name)
  
  return(combined)
}

pdf("pca_batch_check_gtex.pdf", width = 12, height = 10)

organs <- unique(sample_metadata_organ$SMTS_refined)

for (org in organs) {
  p <- run_pca_batch_check(org, sample_metadata_organ, txi_data)
  print(p)
}

dev.off()

```
